rationale: The cited paper appears in grouped citations as an example of recent work on psychological processes in WOM, mainly to position the literature stream. The citing paper does not rely on this specific study for its core theory, hypotheses, mechanism, measures, or empirical design, which center on attribution and temporal contiguity. There is no distinct discussion of Berger and Schwartz's immediate-versus-ongoing WOM framework in the argumentation. So the citation functions as background positioning rather than a specific substantive building block.
